name: Mermaid Live Editor
short_desc: Edit, preview and share mermaid diagrams
author: mermaid-js
description: Mermaid Live Editor is a web-based editor for creating, editing, and sharing Mermaid diagrams. It provides real-time preview of diagrams including flowcharts, sequence diagrams, class diagrams, state diagrams, and many more. Perfect for documentation, technical communication, and visual planning.
